Package nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query

Class TransactionQueryFacade

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query.TransactionQueryFacade
public class TransactionQueryFacade extends Object
Facade that provides a configurable way to query transactions and map the results into arbitrary JavaBeans (including the SCA report beans). Filters supported out of the box:
  • Transaction type (debit or credit via AccountSide).
  • Date range (inclusive) based on booking timestamp.
  • Account filters (match any or require all provided accounts).
  • Memo substring match.
Additional predicates can be attached to extend the query for other parameters or bean-specific needs.

    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig
    Immutable configuration for running a transaction query.
    static final record 
    TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord
    Result of a transaction query that captures the parent transaction and the entries that were used for filtering.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransactionQueryFacade

      public TransactionQueryFacade(Supplier<List<AccountingTransaction>> transactionSupplier)
      Builds a facade that reads transactions from the provided supplier.
      Parameters:
      transactionSupplier - supplies the transactions to search

  • Method Details

    • filterByTransactionType

      public TransactionQueryFacade filterByTransactionType(String transactionType)
      Filters transactions by the transaction type stored in the info map (matching transactionType or type keys).
      Parameters:
      transactionType - type string to match
      Returns:
      this facade for chaining

    • dateRange

      public TransactionQueryFacade dateRange(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Filters transactions by date range (inclusive) using the booking date timestamp.
      Parameters:
      startDate - inclusive start date
      endDate - inclusive end date
      Returns:
      this facade for chaining

    • accounts

      public TransactionQueryFacade accounts(Collection<String> accounts, boolean requireAll)
      Filters transactions by account membership.
      Parameters:
      accounts - account numbers to match
      requireAll - true to require all accounts, false to match any
      Returns:
      this facade for chaining

    • memoContains

      public TransactionQueryFacade memoContains(String memoContains)
      Filters by memo substring.
      Parameters:
      memoContains - the memo contains
      Returns:
      the transaction query facade

    • query

      public List<TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord> query(TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig config)
      Queries transactions according to the provided configuration and returns a lightweight record containing the transaction and the entries that matched the account filter (if any).
      Parameters:
      config - configuration describing the desired filters
      Returns:
      ordered list of matching transaction records

    • queryAndMap

      public <T> List<T> queryAndMap(TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig config, Function<TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord,T> mapper)
      Queries and immediately maps the resulting records into bean instances.
      Type Parameters:
      T - bean type
      Parameters:
      config - configuration describing the desired filters
      mapper - mapping function to transform a record into a bean
      Returns:
      mapped beans (null results are skipped)

    • filterTransactions

      public List<AccountingTransaction> filterTransactions(Collection<AccountingTransaction> transactions)
      Filters the provided transactions using the fluent filter configuration.
      Parameters:
      transactions - transactions to filter
      Returns:
      matching transactions

    • mapToBeans

      public <T> List<T> mapToBeans(Collection<AccountingTransaction> transactions, Function<AccountingTransaction,T> mapper)
      Filters and maps the provided transactions to bean instances.
      Type Parameters:
      T - bean type
      Parameters:
      transactions - transactions to filter
      mapper - mapper to transform transactions into beans
      Returns:
      mapped beans
